# Project: gdocs-md

## Work Breakdown

### 1. backend-go-developer (Go Implementation)
**Status**: Delegated
**Scope**: All Go source code for the CLI tool

Tasks:
- Initialize go.mod with module name `github.com/brittcrawford/gdocs-md` and all dependencies from Design.md
- Implement ragfs package (Handler interface, FUSE server, caching, node types) per Design.md specs
- Implement gdrive package (OAuth, Drive API client, Docs API, Handler implementation)
- Implement converter package (Google Doc JSON -> Markdown, Markdown -> Doc API requests)
- Implement CLI commands (auth, mount, version) using cobra
- Implement cmd/gdocs-md/main.go entry point
- Write comprehensive tests for all packages
- Ensure `go test ./...` passes

Flow: backend-go-developer -> go-readability-reviewer -> stpa-analyst

### 2. shell-script-coder (Build/Install Scripts)
**Status**: Delegated
**Scope**: Shell scripts for build and install

Tasks:
- scripts/build.sh - Build binary with version info (git tag, commit hash, build date)
- scripts/install.sh - Install binary to system path (/usr/local/bin or $GOPATH/bin)

Flow: shell-script-coder -> shell-script-reviewer -> stpa-analyst

## Delegation Log

| Timestamp | From | To | Message Summary |
|-----------|------|-----|-----------------|
| 2026-03-12T17:11:30Z | coordinator | backend-go-developer | Full Go implementation per Design.md - all packages, CLI, tests |
| 2026-03-12T17:11:31Z | coordinator | shell-script-coder | Build and install shell scripts for gdocs-md |
| 2026-03-12T17:15:00Z | coordinator | backend-go-developer | Re-delegation: Implement full gdocs-md per Design.md |
| 2026-03-12T17:15:01Z | coordinator | shell-script-coder | Re-delegation: Build/install scripts |

## Messages for backend-go-developer

You are responsible for implementing the entire Go codebase for `gdocs-md`. Read `Design.md` for full architecture details.

**Package layout** (from Design.md):
```
cmd/gdocs-md/main.go
internal/cli/root.go, mount.go, auth.go
internal/gdrive/handler.go, client.go, docs.go, oauth.go, types.go
internal/converter/tomarkdown.go, frommarkdown.go, elements.go, converter_test.go
internal/ragfs/ragfs.go, handler.go, cache.go, node.go, types.go
```

**Key requirements**:
1. Module: `github.com/brittcrawford/gdocs-md`
2. Dependencies: bazil.org/fuse, google.golang.org/api/drive/v3, google.golang.org/api/docs/v1, golang.org/x/oauth2, github.com/spf13/cobra, github.com/yuin/goldmark, github.com/hashicorp/golang-lru/v2
3. Handler interface per Design.md (List, Read, Write, Delete, Rename, Stat, Create)
4. Cache with metadata TTL 30s, content TTL 60s, 100MB LRU cap
5. OAuth 2.0 with token storage in $XDG_CONFIG_HOME/gdocs-md/
6. All three phases: read-only mount, write support, reliability
7. `go test ./...` MUST pass

**Send message to coordinator when done**: "GOAL COMPLETE: All Go implementation done, tests passing"

## Messages for shell-script-coder

You are responsible for creating two shell scripts in `scripts/`:

1. **scripts/build.sh** - Build the gdocs-md binary
   - Accept optional version argument, default to git tag
   - Embed version, commit hash, build date via -ldflags
   - Output binary to `bin/gdocs-md`
   - Cross-compilation support (GOOS/GOARCH env vars)

2. **scripts/install.sh** - Install the binary
   - Run build.sh first if binary doesn't exist
   - Copy to /usr/local/bin (with sudo if needed) or $GOPATH/bin
   - Verify installation
   - Print usage instructions

**Send message to coordinator when done**: "GOAL COMPLETE: Shell scripts done"

## Success Criteria Mapping

| Criterion | Responsible Agent | Phase |
|-----------|-------------------|-------|
| OAuth authentication | backend-go-developer | 1 |
| Mount folder as filesystem | backend-go-developer | 1 |
| Docs readable as markdown | backend-go-developer | 1 |
| Edit/save updates Doc | backend-go-developer | 2 |
| Delete removes from Drive | backend-go-developer | 2 |
| Move/rename files | backend-go-developer | 2 |
| Cache latency <200ms | backend-go-developer | 1 |
| 95% round-trip fidelity | backend-go-developer | 3 |
| PDF/image pass-through | backend-go-developer | 1 |
| No data loss | backend-go-developer | 3 |

[00:00:04.978][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → ### 6. Detect Completion Gate

[00:00:04.978][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → Look for test commands:
[00:00:04.978][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   →

[00:00:04.978][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → |------|-------------|
[00:00:04.978][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → | `go.mod` | `go test ./...` |
[00:00:04.978][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → | `package.json` with test script | `npm test` |
[00:00:04.978][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → | `Makefile` with test target | `make test` |
[00:00:04.978][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → | None | Omit `completionGateScript` |
[00:00:04.978][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → 
[00:00:04.978][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → ### 7. Show Preview

[00:00:04.978][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → Display the complete GOAL.md and ask:

[00:00:04.978][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → 
[00:00:04.978][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → ### 8. Backup and Write

[00:00:04.978][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → 
[00:00:04.978][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → Write new `GOAL.md` to repository root.

[00:00:05.279][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 18: A Go CLI tool (`gdocs-md`) that mounts Google Drive as a local FUSE filesystem, presenting Google Docs as editable markdown files. Built on the `ragfs` framework which handles FUSE integration and caching.
[00:00:05.279][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 19: 
[00:00:05.279][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 20: See `Design.md` for full architecture, handler interface, and phased MVP scope.
[00:00:05.279][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 21: 
[00:00:05.279][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 22: ## Success Criteria
[00:00:05.279][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 23: 
[00:00:05.279][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 24: - [ ] Users can authenticate with Google Drive via OAuth and have tokens stored securely in their config directory
[00:00:05.279][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 25: - [ ] A Google Drive folder can be mounted as a local filesystem directory using `gdocs-md mount`
[00:00:05.279][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 26: - [ ] Google Docs appear as `.md` files and their content is readable as markdown
[00:00:05.279][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 27: - [ ] Editing and saving a `.md` file updates the corresponding Google Doc in Drive
[00:00:05.279][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 28: - [ ] Deleting a mounted file removes the corresponding document from Google Drive
[00:00:05.279][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 29: - [ ] Files can be moved or renamed within the mounted filesystem
[00:00:05.280][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 30: - [ ] Repeated reads of the same document are served from cache with latency under 200ms
[00:00:05.280][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 31: - [ ] Round-trip markdown conversion preserves at least 95% of document formatting
[00:00:05.280][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 32: - [ ] PDFs and images are accessible as pass-through files without modification
[00:00:05.280][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 33: - [ ] No data loss occurs during read/write/sync operations
[00:00:05.280][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:05.280][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → (End of file - total 33 lines)

[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002] skill(name: 'sgai-goal')

[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → # Skill: sgai-goal
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → # SGAI Goal Authoring
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → Compose GOAL.md files for SGAI workspaces through interactive conversation.
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ## When to Use
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - User says "start a new feature/project/fix"
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - User describes work to be done in an SGAI-managed repo
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - User asks to "create a goal" or "set up SGAI"
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ## Process
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ```mermaid
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → flowchart TB
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   →     detect["Detect tech stack"]
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   →     prefs["Load/ask model preferences"]
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   →     describe["Ask: What do you want to accomplish?"]
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   →     criteria["Draft success criteria"]
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   →     confirm["Show preview, ask for confirmation"]
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   →     backup["Backup existing GOAL.md if present"]
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   →     write["Write GOAL.md"]
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   →     detect --> prefs --> describe --> criteria --> confirm --> backup --> write
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ```
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ### 1. Detect Tech Stack
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → Scan the repository for files and choose appropriate agents:
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | Detection | Stack | Developer Agent | Reviewer Agent |
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → |-----------|-------|-----------------|----------------|
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | `go.mod` | Go backend | backend-go-developer | go-readability-reviewer |
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | `package.json` + react deps | React | react-developer | react-reviewer |
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | `package.json` + htmx deps | HTMX | htmx-picocss-frontend-developer | htmx-picocss-frontend-reviewer |
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | `*.sh`, `Makefile`, or CLI tool | Shell | shell-script-coder | shell-script-reviewer |
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | `wrangler.toml` | Cloudflare Worker | general-purpose | cloudflare-worker-deployer |
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | `vercel.json` or Next.js | Vercel | react-developer | vercel-deployer |
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | Python + Claude SDK | Agent SDK | general-purpose | agent-sdk-verifier-py |
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | TypeScript + Claude SDK | Agent SDK | general-purpose | agent-sdk-verifier-ts |
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | Python + OpenAI SDK | OpenAI Agent | general-purpose | openai-sdk-verifier-py |
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | TypeScript + OpenAI SDK | OpenAI Agent | general-purpose | openai-sdk-verifier-ts |
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | None detected | General | general-purpose | — |
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → Multiple stacks combine (e.g., Go + React = both agent chains).
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → **Special-purpose agents** (add when relevant):
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - `c4-code`, `c4-component`, `c4-container`, `c4-context` - Architecture documentation
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - `skill-writer` - Creating SGAI skills
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - `snippet-writer` - Reusable code patterns
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - `webmaster` - Marketing sites and landing pages
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - `project-critic-council` - Multi-model consensus review
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ### 2. Load or Ask Model Preferences
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → Check `.sgai/preferences.json` for saved preferences:
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ```json
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → {
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   →   "models": {
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   →     "coordinator": "anthropic/claude-opus-4-6 (max)",
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   →     "default": "anthropic/claude-opus-4-6"
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   →   }
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → }
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ```
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → If no preferences exist, ask:
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → > "What model should I use for SGAI agents? (e.g., anthropic/claude-opus-4-6)"
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → Save response to `.sgai/preferences.json` for future use.
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ### 3. Ask for Goal Description
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → Ask conversationally:
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → > "What do you want to accomplish?"
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → Listen for:
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - **Feature**: "add", "build", "create", "implement"
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - **Fix**: "bug", "fix", "broken", "error", "issue"
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - **Project**: "new project", "set up", "initialize"
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → If unclear, ask:
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → > "Is this a new feature, a bug fix, or a new project?"
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ### 4. Draft Success Criteria
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → Transform the description into outcome-based success criteria:
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → **User says:** "Add user authentication with OAuth"
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → **Draft as:**
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ```markdown
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - [ ] Users can sign in with OAuth providers
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - [ ] Authenticated sessions persist across browser restarts
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - [ ] Unauthenticated users are redirected to login
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ```
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → **Do NOT write implementation steps** like:
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - ~~Install passport.js~~
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - ~~Create auth middleware~~
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - ~~Add login route~~
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → Ask: "Does this capture what success looks like?"
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ### 5. Build Flow Graph
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → Compose flow based on detected stack. Pattern: `developer -> reviewer -> stpa-analyst`

[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ### 6. Detect Completion Gate

Detect Tech Stack\n\nScan the repository for files and choose appropriate agents:\n\n| Detection | Stack | Developer Agent | Reviewer Agent |\n|-----------|-------|-----------------|----------------|\n| `go.mod` | Go backend | backend-go-developer | go-readability-reviewer |\n| `package.json` + react deps | React | react-developer | react-reviewer |\n| `package.json` + htmx deps | HTMX | htmx-picocss-frontend-developer | htmx-picocss-frontend-reviewer |\n| `*.sh`, `Makefile`, or CLI tool | Shell | shell-script-coder | shell-script-reviewer |\n| `wrangler.toml` | Cloudflare Worker | general-purpose | cloudflare-worker-deployer |\n| `vercel.json` or Next.js | Vercel | react-developer | vercel-deployer |\n| Python + Claude SDK | Agent SDK | general-purpose | agent-sdk-verifier-py |\n| TypeScript + Claude SDK | Agent SDK | general-purpose | agent-sdk-verifier-ts |\n| Python + OpenAI SDK | OpenAI Agent | general-purpose | openai-sdk-verifier-py |\n| TypeScript + OpenAI SDK | OpenAI Agent | general-purpose | openai-sdk-verifier-ts |\n| None detected | General | general-purpose | — |\n\nMultiple stacks combine (e.g., Go + React = both agent chains).\n\n**Special-purpose agent... [00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002] skill(name: 'summoning-the-user')
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → <skill_content name="summoning-the-user">
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → # Skill: summoning-the-user
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → # Summoning the User
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ## Overview
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → Help Claude and subagents identify when to block and request user input rather than proceeding with assumptions or guesses.
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → **Core principle:** When uncertain, assess the risk. High-risk decisions require summoning the user. Low-risk decisions can proceed with reasonable defaults.
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → **Announce at start:** "I'm using the summoning-the-user skill to determine if I need your input before proceeding."
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ## When to Use This Skill
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → Use this skill when:
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - You encounter a blocking decision mid-execution
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Proceeding without user input could lead to wasted work or incorrect implementation
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → **Special note for subagents:** If you're running in the background, default to summoning for anything uncertain. The user isn't watching, so making wrong assumptions wastes their time.
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ## Decision Framework: Should I Summon?
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ### SUMMON (High Risk - Block and Wait)
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → **You MUST summon the user when:**
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Multiple valid implementation paths exist, no clear "right" answer
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Decision affects security, data integrity, or user privacy
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Requirements are ambiguous or contradictory
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - You're about to make an assumption that could waste significant work if wrong
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - The choice has architectural implications (hard to change later)
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - You don't have enough context about user's actual needs
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ### PROCEED (Low Risk - Make Reasonable Choice)
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → **You can proceed without summoning when:**
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - One clear best practice or standard approach exists
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - It's a minor implementation detail (variable name, code style)
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Decision is easily reversible
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - You're following established patterns in the codebase
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - User has already provided sufficient context
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ## How to Summon Effectively
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → When you've determined summoning is needed, follow this process:
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ### 1. Send External Notification
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → **First time:** Ask user which notification method they prefer.
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → **Check user preference, then use one of:**
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → **Option A: terminal-notifier (macOS - requires installation)**
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ```bash
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → # Check if installed
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → which terminal-notifier
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → # If not installed, install via Homebrew
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → brew install terminal-notifier
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → # Get terminal bundle ID
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → case "$TERM_PROGRAM" in
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   →   "iTerm.app") BUNDLE_ID="com.googlecode.iterm2" ;;
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   →   "Apple_Terminal") BUNDLE_ID="com.apple.Terminal" ;;
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   →   "WezTerm") BUNDLE_ID="com.github.wez.wezterm" ;;
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   →   "Ghostty") BUNDLE_ID="com.mitchellh.ghostty" ;;
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   →   "Warp") BUNDLE_ID="dev.warp.Warp-Stable" ;;
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   →   *) BUNDLE_ID="com.apple.Terminal" ;;
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → esac
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → # Send notification that activates terminal on click
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → terminal-notifier -message "🤖 Claude needs your input" -title "Claude Code" -activate "$BUNDLE_ID"
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ```
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → **Notes:**
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Requires `terminal-notifier` (install via `brew install terminal-notifier`)
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Clicking notification focuses the terminal application
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Auto-detects terminal type via `$TERM_PROGRAM`
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Works with iTerm2, Terminal.app, Ghostty, WezTerm, Warp
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → **Option B: OSA Script (macOS - no installation, basic)**
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ```bash
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → TERMINAL_APP="${TERM_PROGRAM:-Terminal}"
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → osascript -e 'display notification "🤖 Claude needs your input" with title "Claude Code"' && \
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → osascript -e "tell application \"$TERMINAL_APP\" to activate"
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ```
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → **Notes:**
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - No installation required but less reliable
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Activates terminal immediately (not on click)
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - May open Script Editor on notification click
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Consider using terminal-notifier or Slack CLI instead
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → **Option C: Slack CLI**
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Check if installed: `slack version`
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - If not installed: Follow https://docs.slack.dev/tools/slack-cli/guides/installing-the-slack-cli-for-mac-and-linux
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Send notification: `slack chat send --channel @username --text "Claude needs your input"`
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ### 2. Use AskUserQuestion Tool
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Creates UI prompt that demands attention
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Provides structured options (prevents vague responses)
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Forces explicit choice before proceeding
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ### 3. Be Explicit About Blocking
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - State clearly: "I need your input before proceeding"
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Explain WHY you're blocked (what decision/ambiguity you're facing)
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Don't hide the question in lots of other text
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ### 4. Provide Context
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Briefly explain what you were doing when you got blocked
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - State what information you need
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Explain the consequences of different choices if relevant
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ## Example
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ```
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → I'm blocked and need your input.
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → I was implementing the user authentication system and encountered
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → an ambiguity: should failed login attempts be logged with the
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → username included (better for security auditing but potential
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → privacy concern) or without (more private but harder to trace
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → attack patterns)?
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → [Sends OSA notification or Slack message]
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → [Uses AskUserQuestion with structured options]
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ```
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ## Key Principles
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | Principle | Application |
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → |-----------|-------------|
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | **Assess risk first** | Use the decision framework before acting |
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | **Default to summoning when uncertain** | Especially for background agents |
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | **Always send external notification** | User may not be watching terminal |
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | **Use AskUserQuestion tool** | Structured choices get better responses |
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | **Be explicit about blocking** | Don't hide that you're waiting |
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | **Provide context** | Help user understand why you need input |
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ## Anti-Patterns
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → **DON'T:**
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Summon for trivial decisions you can make yourself
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Proceed with high-risk assumptions to "save time"
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Ask questions without sending external notification
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Hide questions in verbose output
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Make the user guess what you need
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → **DO:**
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Assess risk using the framework
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Send notification before asking
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Be clear and concise about what you need
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Use structured questions (AskUserQuestion)
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Explain the stakes of the decision
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   →

[00:04:47.903][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002] skill(name: 'idea-to-design')
[00:04:47.903][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → <skill_content name="idea-to-design">
[00:04:47.903][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → # Skill: idea-to-design
[00:04:47.903][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.903][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → # Idea to Design
[00:04:47.903][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.903][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → Transform raw idea notes into comprehensive design documents autonomously.
[00:04:47.903][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.903][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ## Process
[00:04:47.903][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.903][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 1. **Read the idea note** - Understand what's being proposed
[00:04:47.903][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 2. **Create folder** - Inside the Ideas folder, create a subfolder named after the idea
[00:04:47.903][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 3. **Move original** - Move the original idea note into the new folder
[00:04:47.903][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 4. **Research** - Investigate unknowns, find relevant information, explore feasibility
[00:04:47.903][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 5. **Write design doc** - Answer: What is it? Who is it for? How does it work? Where is it deployed?
[00:04:47.903][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 6. **Document decisions** - Create explicit Decisions.md listing choices made and reasoning
[00:04:47.903][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.903][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ## Required Outputs
[00:04:47.903][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.903][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → All files go in `Ideas/<Idea Name>/`:
[00:04:47.903][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.903][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | File | Purpose |
[00:04:47.903][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → |------|---------|
[00:04:47.903][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | `<Original>.md` | The original idea note (moved here) |
[00:04:47.903][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | `Design.md` | Comprehensive design document |
[00:04:47.903][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | `Decisions.md` | Explicit list of decisions with reasoning |
[00:04:47.903][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | `Research.md` | Sources consulted, findings, and references |
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ## Autonomy
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → **Ask zero questions.** Make reasonable decisions and document them. If something is unclear:
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - State the assumption
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Make a choice
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Document it in Decisions.md
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ## Design Doc Should Answer
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Is it software, hardware, or a service?
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Who is the target audience?
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - How will it work technically?
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Where will it be deployed/run?
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - What's the business model (if applicable)?
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - What are the risks and mitigations?
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - What are the next steps?
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ## Diagrams
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → **Use Mermaid for all diagrams.** Obsidian renders Mermaid natively.
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Architecture diagrams: `flowchart TB` or `flowchart LR`
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Sequences: `sequenceDiagram`
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Data flow: `flowchart` with subgraphs
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - State machines: `stateDiagram-v2`
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → Never use ASCII art.
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ## Research.md Should Include
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Questions that needed answering
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Sources consulted (web searches, docs, etc.)
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Key findings that informed the design
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Gaps that couldn't be filled
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ## Decisions.md Format

[00:04:47.948][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002] skill(name: 'apple-notes')

[00:04:47.948][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → # Skill: apple-notes
[00:04:47.948][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.948][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → # Apple Notes CLI
[00:04:47.948][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.948][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → Use `memo notes` to manage Apple Notes directly from the terminal.
[00:04:47.948][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.948][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ## Setup
[00:04:47.948][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.948][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - **Homebrew:** `brew tap antoniorodr/memo && brew install antoniorodr/memo/memo`
[00:04:47.948][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - **Manual (pip):** `pip install .` after cloning https://github.com/antoniorodr/memo
[00:04:47.948][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - macOS-only; grant Automation access to Notes.app when prompted
[00:04:47.948][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ## Quick Reference
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | Action | Command |
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → |--------|---------|
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | List all notes | `memo notes` |
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | Filter by folder | `memo notes -f "Folder Name"` |
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | Search (fuzzy) | `memo notes -s "query"` |
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | Create note | `memo notes -a` or `memo notes -a "Title"` |
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | Edit note | `memo notes -e` |
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | Delete note | `memo notes -d` |
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | Move to folder | `memo notes -m` |
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | Export | `memo notes -ex` |
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ## Commands
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → **View Notes**
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - `memo notes` — List all notes
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - `memo notes -f "Folder Name"` — Filter by folder
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - `memo notes -s "query"` — Fuzzy search
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → **Create Notes**
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - `memo notes -a` — Opens interactive editor
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - `memo notes -a "Note Title"` — Quick add with title
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → **Edit Notes**
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - `memo notes -e` — Interactive selection of note to edit
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → **Delete Notes**
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - `memo notes -d` — Interactive selection of note to delete
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → **Move Notes**
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - `memo notes -m` — Interactive selection of note and destination folder
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → **Export Notes**
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - `memo notes -ex` — Export selected note to HTML/Markdown
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ## Limitations
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Cannot edit notes containing images or attachments
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Interactive prompts require terminal access
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - macOS-only (requires Apple Notes.app)

[00:00:04.210][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → 18: A Go CLI tool (`gdocs-md`) that mounts Google Drive as a local FUSE filesystem, presenting Google Docs as editable markdown files. Built on the `ragfs` framework which handles FUSE integration and caching.
[00:00:04.210][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → 19: 
[00:00:04.211][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → 20: See `Design.md` for full architecture, handler interface, and phased MVP scope.
[00:00:04.211][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → 21: 
[00:00:04.211][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → 22: ## Success Criteria
[00:00:04.211][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → 23: 
[00:00:04.211][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → 24: - [ ] Users can authenticate with Google Drive via OAuth and have tokens stored securely in their config directory
[00:00:04.211][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → 25: - [ ] A Google Drive folder can be mounted as a local filesystem directory using `gdocs-md mount`
[00:00:04.211][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → 26: - [ ] Google Docs appear as `.md` files and their content is readable as markdown
[00:00:04.211][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → 27: - [ ] Editing and saving a `.md` file updates the corresponding Google Doc in Drive
[00:00:04.211][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → 28: - [ ] Deleting a mounted file removes the corresponding document from Google Drive
[00:00:04.211][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → 29: - [ ] Files can be moved or renamed within the mounted filesystem
[00:00:04.211][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → 30: - [ ] Repeated reads of the same document are served from cache with latency under 200ms
[00:00:04.211][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → 31: - [ ] Round-trip markdown conversion preserves at least 95% of document formatting
[00:00:04.211][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → 32: - [ ] PDFs and images are accessible as pass-through files without modification
[00:00:04.211][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → 33: - [ ] No data loss occurs during read/write/sync operations
[00:00:04.211][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   →

[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → # Skill: sgai-goal
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → 
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → # SGAI Goal Authoring
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → 
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → Compose GOAL.md files for SGAI workspaces through interactive conversation.
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → 
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → ## When to Use
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → 
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → - User says "start a new feature/project/fix"
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → - User describes work to be done in an SGAI-managed repo
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → - User asks to "create a goal" or "set up SGAI"
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → 
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → ## Process
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → 
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → ```mermaid
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → flowchart TB
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   →     detect["Detect tech stack"]
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   →     prefs["Load/ask model preferences"]
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   →     describe["Ask: What do you want to accomplish?"]
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   →     criteria["Draft success criteria"]
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   →     confirm["Show preview, ask for confirmation"]
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   →     backup["Backup existing GOAL.md if present"]
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   →     write["Write GOAL.md"]
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → 
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   →     detect --> prefs --> describe --> criteria --> confirm --> backup --> write
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → ```
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → 
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → ### 1. Detect Tech Stack
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → 
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → Scan the repository for files and choose appropriate agents:
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → 
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → | Detection | Stack | Developer Agent | Reviewer Agent |
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → |-----------|-------|-----------------|----------------|
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → | `go.mod` | Go backend | backend-go-developer | go-readability-reviewer |
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → | `package.json` + react deps | React | react-developer | react-reviewer |
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → | `package.json` + htmx deps | HTMX | htmx-picocss-frontend-developer | htmx-picocss-frontend-reviewer |
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → | `*.sh`, `Makefile`, or CLI tool | Shell | shell-script-coder | shell-script-reviewer |
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → | `wrangler.toml` | Cloudflare Worker | general-purpose | cloudflare-worker-deployer |
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → | `vercel.json` or Next.js | Vercel | react-developer | vercel-deployer |
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → | Python + Claude SDK | Agent SDK | general-purpose | agent-sdk-verifier-py |
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → | TypeScript + Claude SDK | Agent SDK | general-purpose | agent-sdk-verifier-ts |
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → | Python + OpenAI SDK | OpenAI Agent | general-purpose | openai-sdk-verifier-py |
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → | TypeScript + OpenAI SDK | OpenAI Agent | general-purpose | openai-sdk-verifier-ts |
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → | None detected | General | general-purpose | — |
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → 
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → Multiple stacks combine (e.g., Go + React = both agent chains).
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → 
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → **Special-purpose agents** (add when relevant):
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → - `c4-code`, `c4-component`, `c4-container`, `c4-context` - Architecture documentation
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → - `skill-writer` - Creating SGAI skills
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → - `snippet-writer` - Reusable code patterns
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → - `webmaster` - Marketing sites and landing pages
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → - `project-critic-council` - Multi-model consensus review
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → 
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → ### 2. Load or Ask Model Preferences
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → 
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → Check `.sgai/preferences.json` for saved preferences:
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → 
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → ```json
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → {
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   →   "models": {
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   →     "coordinator": "anthropic/claude-opus-4-6 (max)",
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   →     "default": "anthropic/claude-opus-4-6"
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   →   }
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → }
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → ```
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → 
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → If no preferences exist, ask:
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → > "What model should I use for SGAI agents? (e.g., anthropic/claude-opus-4-6)"
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → 
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → Save response to `.sgai/preferences.json` for future use.
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → 
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → ### 3. Ask for Goal Description
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → 
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → Ask conversationally:
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → > "What do you want to accomplish?"
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → 
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → Listen for:
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → - **Feature**: "add", "build", "create", "implement"
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → - **Fix**: "bug", "fix", "broken", "error", "issue"
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → - **Project**: "new project", "set up", "initialize"
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → 
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → If unclear, ask:
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → > "Is this a new feature, a bug fix, or a new project?"
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → 
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → ### 4. Draft Success Criteria
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → 
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → Transform the description into outcome-based success criteria:
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → 
[00:00:04.977][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → **User says:** "Add user authentication with OAuth"

[00:00:04.978][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → - [ ] Authenticated sessions persist across browser restarts
[00:00:04.978][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → - [ ] Unauthenticated users are redirected to login
[00:00:04.978][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → ```

[00:00:04.978][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → ### 6. Detect Completion Gate

[00:00:04.978][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → Look for test commands:
[00:00:04.978][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   →

[00:00:04.978][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → |------|-------------|
[00:00:04.978][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → | `go.mod` | `go test ./...` |
[00:00:04.978][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → | `package.json` with test script | `npm test` |
[00:00:04.978][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → | `Makefile` with test target | `make test` |
[00:00:04.978][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → | None | Omit `completionGateScript` |
[00:00:04.978][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → 
[00:00:04.978][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0001]   → ### 7. Show Preview

[00:00:05.279][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 18: A Go CLI tool (`gdocs-md`) that mounts Google Drive as a local FUSE filesystem, presenting Google Docs as editable markdown files. Built on the `ragfs` framework which handles FUSE integration and caching.
[00:00:05.279][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 19: 
[00:00:05.279][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 20: See `Design.md` for full architecture, handler interface, and phased MVP scope.
[00:00:05.279][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 21: 
[00:00:05.279][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 22: ## Success Criteria
[00:00:05.279][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 23: 
[00:00:05.279][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 24: - [ ] Users can authenticate with Google Drive via OAuth and have tokens stored securely in their config directory
[00:00:05.279][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 25: - [ ] A Google Drive folder can be mounted as a local filesystem directory using `gdocs-md mount`
[00:00:05.279][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 26: - [ ] Google Docs appear as `.md` files and their content is readable as markdown
[00:00:05.279][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 27: - [ ] Editing and saving a `.md` file updates the corresponding Google Doc in Drive
[00:00:05.279][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 28: - [ ] Deleting a mounted file removes the corresponding document from Google Drive
[00:00:05.279][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 29: - [ ] Files can be moved or renamed within the mounted filesystem
[00:00:05.280][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 30: - [ ] Repeated reads of the same document are served from cache with latency under 200ms
[00:00:05.280][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 31: - [ ] Round-trip markdown conversion preserves at least 95% of document formatting
[00:00:05.280][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 32: - [ ] PDFs and images are accessible as pass-through files without modification
[00:00:05.280][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 33: - [ ] No data loss occurs during read/write/sync operations
[00:00:05.280][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:05.280][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → (End of file - total 33 lines)

[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002] skill(name: 'sgai-goal')
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → <skill_content name="sgai-goal">
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → # Skill: sgai-goal
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → # SGAI Goal Authoring
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → Compose GOAL.md files for SGAI workspaces through interactive conversation.
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ## When to Use
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - User says "start a new feature/project/fix"
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - User describes work to be done in an SGAI-managed repo
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - User asks to "create a goal" or "set up SGAI"
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ## Process
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ```mermaid
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → flowchart TB
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   →     detect["Detect tech stack"]
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   →     prefs["Load/ask model preferences"]
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   →     describe["Ask: What do you want to accomplish?"]
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   →     criteria["Draft success criteria"]
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   →     confirm["Show preview, ask for confirmation"]
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   →     backup["Backup existing GOAL.md if present"]
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   →     write["Write GOAL.md"]
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   →     detect --> prefs --> describe --> criteria --> confirm --> backup --> write
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ```
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ### 1. Detect Tech Stack
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → Scan the repository for files and choose appropriate agents:
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | Detection | Stack | Developer Agent | Reviewer Agent |
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → |-----------|-------|-----------------|----------------|
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | `go.mod` | Go backend | backend-go-developer | go-readability-reviewer |
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | `package.json` + react deps | React | react-developer | react-reviewer |
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | `package.json` + htmx deps | HTMX | htmx-picocss-frontend-developer | htmx-picocss-frontend-reviewer |
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | `*.sh`, `Makefile`, or CLI tool | Shell | shell-script-coder | shell-script-reviewer |
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | `wrangler.toml` | Cloudflare Worker | general-purpose | cloudflare-worker-deployer |
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | `vercel.json` or Next.js | Vercel | react-developer | vercel-deployer |
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | Python + Claude SDK | Agent SDK | general-purpose | agent-sdk-verifier-py |
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | TypeScript + Claude SDK | Agent SDK | general-purpose | agent-sdk-verifier-ts |
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | Python + OpenAI SDK | OpenAI Agent | general-purpose | openai-sdk-verifier-py |
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | TypeScript + OpenAI SDK | OpenAI Agent | general-purpose | openai-sdk-verifier-ts |
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | None detected | General | general-purpose | — |
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → Multiple stacks combine (e.g., Go + React = both agent chains).
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → **Special-purpose agents** (add when relevant):
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - `c4-code`, `c4-component`, `c4-container`, `c4-context` - Architecture documentation
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - `skill-writer` - Creating SGAI skills
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - `snippet-writer` - Reusable code patterns
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - `webmaster` - Marketing sites and landing pages
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - `project-critic-council` - Multi-model consensus review
[00:00:06.090][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ### 2. Load or Ask Model Preferences
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → Check `.sgai/preferences.json` for saved preferences:
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ```json
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → {
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   →   "models": {
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   →     "coordinator": "anthropic/claude-opus-4-6 (max)",
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   →     "default": "anthropic/claude-opus-4-6"
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   →   }
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → }
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ```
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → If no preferences exist, ask:
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → > "What model should I use for SGAI agents? (e.g., anthropic/claude-opus-4-6)"
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → Save response to `.sgai/preferences.json` for future use.
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ### 3. Ask for Goal Description
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → Ask conversationally:
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → > "What do you want to accomplish?"
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → Listen for:
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - **Feature**: "add", "build", "create", "implement"
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - **Fix**: "bug", "fix", "broken", "error", "issue"
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - **Project**: "new project", "set up", "initialize"
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → If unclear, ask:
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → > "Is this a new feature, a bug fix, or a new project?"
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ### 4. Draft Success Criteria
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → Transform the description into outcome-based success criteria:
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → **User says:** "Add user authentication with OAuth"
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → **Draft as:**
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ```markdown
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - [ ] Users can sign in with OAuth providers
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - [ ] Authenticated sessions persist across browser restarts
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - [ ] Unauthenticated users are redirected to login
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ```
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → **Do NOT write implementation steps** like:
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - ~~Install passport.js~~
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - ~~Create auth middleware~~
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - ~~Add login route~~
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → Ask: "Does this capture what success looks like?"
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ### 5. Build Flow Graph
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → Compose flow based on detected stack. Pattern: `developer -> reviewer -> stpa-analyst`
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → **Go backend:**
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ```yaml
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → flow: |
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   →   "backend-go-developer" -> "go-readability-reviewer"
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   →   "go-readability-reviewer" -> "stpa-analyst"
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ```
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → **React frontend:**
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ```yaml
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → flow: |
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   →   "react-developer" -> "react-reviewer"
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   →   "react-reviewer" -> "stpa-analyst"
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ```

[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → **HTMX frontend:**

[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → flow: |
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   →   "htmx-picocss-frontend-developer" -> "htmx-picocss-frontend-reviewer"
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   →   "htmx-picocss-frontend-reviewer" -> "stpa-analyst"
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ```
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → **Go + React (full stack):**
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ```yaml
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → flow: |

[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   →   "go-readability-reviewer" -> "stpa-analyst"
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   →   "react-developer" -> "react-reviewer"

[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   →   "shell-script-reviewer" -> "stpa-analyst"

[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ### 6. Detect Completion Gate
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → Look for test commands:
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | File | Gate Script |
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → |------|-------------|
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | `go.mod` | `go test ./...` |
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | `package.json` with test script | `npm test` |
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | `Makefile` with test target | `make test` |
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | None | Omit `completionGateScript` |
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ### 7. Show Preview
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.091][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → Display the complete GOAL.md and ask:
[00:00:06.092][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → > "Here's the goal file. Ready to write it?"
[00:00:06.092][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.092][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ### 8. Backup and Write
[00:00:06.092][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.092][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → If `GOAL.md` exists:
[00:00:06.092][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 1. Rename to `GOAL.md.YYYY-MM-DD-HHMMSS.bak`
[00:00:06.092][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 2. Inform user of backup
[00:00:06.092][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.092][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → Write new `GOAL.md` to repository root.

[00:00:06.092][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.092][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ```yaml
[00:00:06.092][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ---

[00:00:06.092][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   →   "agent-b" -> "stpa-analyst"
[00:00:06.092][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → models:
[00:00:06.092][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   →   "coordinator": "anthropic/claude-opus-4-6 (max)"
[00:00:06.092][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   →   "agent-a": "anthropic/claude-opus-4-6"
[00:00:06.092][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   →   "agent-b": "anthropic/claude-opus-4-6"

[00:00:06.092][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → interactive: yes

[00:00:06.092][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:00:06.092][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → Brief description of the goal in 1-2 sentences.

[00:00:06.092][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ```

Detect Tech Stack\n\nScan the repository for files and choose appropriate agents:\n\n| Detection | Stack | Developer Agent | Reviewer Agent |\n|-----------|-------|-----------------|----------------|\n| `go.mod` | Go backend | backend-go-developer | go-readability-reviewer |\n| `package.json` + react deps | React | react-developer | react-reviewer |\n| `package.json` + htmx deps | HTMX | htmx-picocss-frontend-developer | htmx-picocss-frontend-reviewer |\n| `*.sh`, `Makefile`, or CLI tool | Shell | shell-script-coder | shell-script-reviewer |\n| `wrangler.toml` | Cloudflare Worker | general-purpose | cloudflare-worker-deployer |\n| `vercel.json` or Next.js | Vercel | react-developer | vercel-deployer |\n| Python + Claude SDK | Agent SDK | general-purpose | agent-sdk-verifier-py |\n| TypeScript + Claude SDK | Agent SDK | general-purpose | agent-sdk-verifier-ts |\n| Python + OpenAI SDK | OpenAI Agent | general-purpose | openai-sdk-verifier-py |\n| TypeScript + OpenAI SDK | OpenAI Agent | general-purpose | openai-sdk-verifier-ts |\n| None detected | General | general-purpose | — |\n\nMultiple stacks combine (e.g., Go + React = both agent chains).\n\n**Special-purpose agent...
