[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002] skill(name: 'summoning-the-user')
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → <skill_content name="summoning-the-user">
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → # Skill: summoning-the-user
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → # Summoning the User
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ## Overview
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → Help Claude and subagents identify when to block and request user input rather than proceeding with assumptions or guesses.
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → **Core principle:** When uncertain, assess the risk. High-risk decisions require summoning the user. Low-risk decisions can proceed with reasonable defaults.
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → **Announce at start:** "I'm using the summoning-the-user skill to determine if I need your input before proceeding."
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ## When to Use This Skill
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → Use this skill when:
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - You encounter a blocking decision mid-execution
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Proceeding without user input could lead to wasted work or incorrect implementation
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → **Special note for subagents:** If you're running in the background, default to summoning for anything uncertain. The user isn't watching, so making wrong assumptions wastes their time.
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ## Decision Framework: Should I Summon?
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ### SUMMON (High Risk - Block and Wait)
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → **You MUST summon the user when:**
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Multiple valid implementation paths exist, no clear "right" answer
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Decision affects security, data integrity, or user privacy
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Requirements are ambiguous or contradictory
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - You're about to make an assumption that could waste significant work if wrong
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - The choice has architectural implications (hard to change later)
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - You don't have enough context about user's actual needs
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ### PROCEED (Low Risk - Make Reasonable Choice)
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → **You can proceed without summoning when:**
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - One clear best practice or standard approach exists
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - It's a minor implementation detail (variable name, code style)
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Decision is easily reversible
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - You're following established patterns in the codebase
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - User has already provided sufficient context
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ## How to Summon Effectively
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → When you've determined summoning is needed, follow this process:
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ### 1. Send External Notification
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → **First time:** Ask user which notification method they prefer.
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → **Check user preference, then use one of:**
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → **Option A: terminal-notifier (macOS - requires installation)**
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ```bash
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → # Check if installed
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → which terminal-notifier
[00:04:47.523][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → # If not installed, install via Homebrew
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → brew install terminal-notifier
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → # Get terminal bundle ID
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → case "$TERM_PROGRAM" in
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   →   "iTerm.app") BUNDLE_ID="com.googlecode.iterm2" ;;
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   →   "Apple_Terminal") BUNDLE_ID="com.apple.Terminal" ;;
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   →   "WezTerm") BUNDLE_ID="com.github.wez.wezterm" ;;
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   →   "Ghostty") BUNDLE_ID="com.mitchellh.ghostty" ;;
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   →   "Warp") BUNDLE_ID="dev.warp.Warp-Stable" ;;
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   →   *) BUNDLE_ID="com.apple.Terminal" ;;
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → esac
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → # Send notification that activates terminal on click
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → terminal-notifier -message "🤖 Claude needs your input" -title "Claude Code" -activate "$BUNDLE_ID"
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ```
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → **Notes:**
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Requires `terminal-notifier` (install via `brew install terminal-notifier`)
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Clicking notification focuses the terminal application
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Auto-detects terminal type via `$TERM_PROGRAM`
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Works with iTerm2, Terminal.app, Ghostty, WezTerm, Warp
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → **Option B: OSA Script (macOS - no installation, basic)**
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ```bash
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → TERMINAL_APP="${TERM_PROGRAM:-Terminal}"
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → osascript -e 'display notification "🤖 Claude needs your input" with title "Claude Code"' && \
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → osascript -e "tell application \"$TERMINAL_APP\" to activate"
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ```
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → **Notes:**
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - No installation required but less reliable
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Activates terminal immediately (not on click)
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - May open Script Editor on notification click
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Consider using terminal-notifier or Slack CLI instead
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → **Option C: Slack CLI**
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Check if installed: `slack version`
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - If not installed: Follow https://docs.slack.dev/tools/slack-cli/guides/installing-the-slack-cli-for-mac-and-linux
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Send notification: `slack chat send --channel @username --text "Claude needs your input"`
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ### 2. Use AskUserQuestion Tool
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Creates UI prompt that demands attention
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Provides structured options (prevents vague responses)
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Forces explicit choice before proceeding
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ### 3. Be Explicit About Blocking
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - State clearly: "I need your input before proceeding"
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Explain WHY you're blocked (what decision/ambiguity you're facing)
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Don't hide the question in lots of other text
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ### 4. Provide Context
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Briefly explain what you were doing when you got blocked
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - State what information you need
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Explain the consequences of different choices if relevant
[00:04:47.524][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ## Example
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ```
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → I'm blocked and need your input.
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → I was implementing the user authentication system and encountered
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → an ambiguity: should failed login attempts be logged with the
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → username included (better for security auditing but potential
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → privacy concern) or without (more private but harder to trace
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → attack patterns)?
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → [Sends OSA notification or Slack message]
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → [Uses AskUserQuestion with structured options]
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ```
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ## Key Principles
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | Principle | Application |
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → |-----------|-------------|
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | **Assess risk first** | Use the decision framework before acting |
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | **Default to summoning when uncertain** | Especially for background agents |
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | **Always send external notification** | User may not be watching terminal |
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | **Use AskUserQuestion tool** | Structured choices get better responses |
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | **Be explicit about blocking** | Don't hide that you're waiting |
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | **Provide context** | Help user understand why you need input |
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ## Anti-Patterns
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → **DON'T:**
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Summon for trivial decisions you can make yourself
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Proceed with high-risk assumptions to "save time"
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Ask questions without sending external notification
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Hide questions in verbose output
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Make the user guess what you need
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → **DO:**
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Assess risk using the framework
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Send notification before asking
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Be clear and concise about what you need
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Use structured questions (AskUserQuestion)
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Explain the stakes of the decision
[00:04:47.525][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   →

[00:04:47.903][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002] skill(name: 'idea-to-design')
[00:04:47.903][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → <skill_content name="idea-to-design">
[00:04:47.903][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → # Skill: idea-to-design
[00:04:47.903][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.903][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → # Idea to Design
[00:04:47.903][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.903][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → Transform raw idea notes into comprehensive design documents autonomously.
[00:04:47.903][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.903][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ## Process
[00:04:47.903][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.903][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 1. **Read the idea note** - Understand what's being proposed
[00:04:47.903][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 2. **Create folder** - Inside the Ideas folder, create a subfolder named after the idea
[00:04:47.903][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 3. **Move original** - Move the original idea note into the new folder
[00:04:47.903][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 4. **Research** - Investigate unknowns, find relevant information, explore feasibility
[00:04:47.903][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 5. **Write design doc** - Answer: What is it? Who is it for? How does it work? Where is it deployed?
[00:04:47.903][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 6. **Document decisions** - Create explicit Decisions.md listing choices made and reasoning
[00:04:47.903][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.903][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ## Required Outputs
[00:04:47.903][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.903][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → All files go in `Ideas/<Idea Name>/`:
[00:04:47.903][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.903][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | File | Purpose |
[00:04:47.903][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → |------|---------|
[00:04:47.903][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | `<Original>.md` | The original idea note (moved here) |
[00:04:47.903][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | `Design.md` | Comprehensive design document |
[00:04:47.903][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | `Decisions.md` | Explicit list of decisions with reasoning |
[00:04:47.903][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | `Research.md` | Sources consulted, findings, and references |
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ## Autonomy
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → **Ask zero questions.** Make reasonable decisions and document them. If something is unclear:
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - State the assumption
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Make a choice
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Document it in Decisions.md
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ## Design Doc Should Answer
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Is it software, hardware, or a service?
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Who is the target audience?
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - How will it work technically?
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Where will it be deployed/run?
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - What's the business model (if applicable)?
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - What are the risks and mitigations?
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - What are the next steps?
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ## Diagrams
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → **Use Mermaid for all diagrams.** Obsidian renders Mermaid natively.
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Architecture diagrams: `flowchart TB` or `flowchart LR`
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Sequences: `sequenceDiagram`
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Data flow: `flowchart` with subgraphs
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - State machines: `stateDiagram-v2`
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → Never use ASCII art.
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ## Research.md Should Include
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Questions that needed answering
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Sources consulted (web searches, docs, etc.)
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Key findings that informed the design
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Gaps that couldn't be filled
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.904][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ## Decisions.md Format

[00:04:47.948][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002] skill(name: 'apple-notes')

[00:04:47.948][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → # Skill: apple-notes
[00:04:47.948][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.948][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → # Apple Notes CLI
[00:04:47.948][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.948][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → Use `memo notes` to manage Apple Notes directly from the terminal.
[00:04:47.948][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.948][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ## Setup
[00:04:47.948][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.948][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - **Homebrew:** `brew tap antoniorodr/memo && brew install antoniorodr/memo/memo`
[00:04:47.948][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - **Manual (pip):** `pip install .` after cloning https://github.com/antoniorodr/memo
[00:04:47.948][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - macOS-only; grant Automation access to Notes.app when prompted
[00:04:47.948][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ## Quick Reference
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | Action | Command |
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → |--------|---------|
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | List all notes | `memo notes` |
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | Filter by folder | `memo notes -f "Folder Name"` |
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | Search (fuzzy) | `memo notes -s "query"` |
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | Create note | `memo notes -a` or `memo notes -a "Title"` |
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | Edit note | `memo notes -e` |
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | Delete note | `memo notes -d` |
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | Move to folder | `memo notes -m` |
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → | Export | `memo notes -ex` |
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ## Commands
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → **View Notes**
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - `memo notes` — List all notes
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - `memo notes -f "Folder Name"` — Filter by folder
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - `memo notes -s "query"` — Fuzzy search
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → **Create Notes**
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - `memo notes -a` — Opens interactive editor
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - `memo notes -a "Note Title"` — Quick add with title
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → **Edit Notes**
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - `memo notes -e` — Interactive selection of note to edit
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → **Delete Notes**
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - `memo notes -d` — Interactive selection of note to delete
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → **Move Notes**
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - `memo notes -m` — Interactive selection of note and destination folder
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → **Export Notes**
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - `memo notes -ex` — Export selected note to HTML/Markdown
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → ## Limitations
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → 
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Cannot edit notes containing images or attachments
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - Interactive prompts require terminal access
[00:04:47.949][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0002]   → - macOS-only (requires Apple Notes.app)

[00:00:03.978][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 18: A Go CLI tool (`gdocs-md`) that mounts Google Drive as a local FUSE filesystem, presenting Google Docs as editable markdown files. Built on the `ragfs` framework which handles FUSE integration and caching.
[00:00:03.978][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 19: 
[00:00:03.978][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 20: See `Design.md` for full architecture, handler interface, and phased MVP scope.
[00:00:03.978][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 21: 
[00:00:03.978][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 22: ## Success Criteria
[00:00:03.978][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 23: 
[00:00:03.978][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 24: - [ ] Users can authenticate with Google Drive via OAuth and have tokens stored securely in their config directory
[00:00:03.978][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 25: - [ ] A Google Drive folder can be mounted as a local filesystem directory using `gdocs-md mount`
[00:00:03.978][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 26: - [ ] Google Docs appear as `.md` files and their content is readable as markdown
[00:00:03.978][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 27: - [ ] Editing and saving a `.md` file updates the corresponding Google Doc in Drive
[00:00:03.978][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 28: - [ ] Deleting a mounted file removes the corresponding document from Google Drive
[00:00:03.978][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 29: - [ ] Files can be moved or renamed within the mounted filesystem
[00:00:03.978][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 30: - [ ] Repeated reads of the same document are served from cache with latency under 200ms
[00:00:03.978][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 31: - [ ] Round-trip markdown conversion preserves at least 95% of document formatting
[00:00:03.978][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 32: - [ ] PDFs and images are accessible as pass-through files without modification
[00:00:03.978][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 33: - [ ] No data loss occurs during read/write/sync operations
[00:00:03.978][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 
[00:00:03.978][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → (End of file - total 33 lines)

[00:00:04.748][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   →     write["Write GOAL.md"]
[00:00:04.748][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 
[00:00:04.748][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   →     detect --> prefs --> describe --> criteria --> confirm --> backup --> write

[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → **Special-purpose agents** (add when relevant):
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → - `c4-code`, `c4-component`, `c4-container`, `c4-context` - Architecture documentation
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → - `skill-writer` - Creating SGAI skills
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → - `snippet-writer` - Reusable code patterns
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → - `webmaster` - Marketing sites and landing pages
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → - `project-critic-council` - Multi-model consensus review
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → ### 2. Load or Ask Model Preferences
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → Check `.sgai/preferences.json` for saved preferences:
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → ```json
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → {
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   →   "models": {
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   →     "coordinator": "anthropic/claude-opus-4-6 (max)",
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   →     "default": "anthropic/claude-opus-4-6"
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   →   }
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → }
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → ```
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → If no preferences exist, ask:
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → > "What model should I use for SGAI agents? (e.g., anthropic/claude-opus-4-6)"
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → Save response to `.sgai/preferences.json` for future use.
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → ### 3. Ask for Goal Description
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → Ask conversationally:
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → > "What do you want to accomplish?"
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → Listen for:
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → - **Feature**: "add", "build", "create", "implement"
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → - **Fix**: "bug", "fix", "broken", "error", "issue"
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → - **Project**: "new project", "set up", "initialize"
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → If unclear, ask:
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → > "Is this a new feature, a bug fix, or a new project?"
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → ### 4. Draft Success Criteria
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → Transform the description into outcome-based success criteria:
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → **User says:** "Add user authentication with OAuth"
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → **Draft as:**
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → ```markdown
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → - [ ] Users can sign in with OAuth providers
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → - [ ] Authenticated sessions persist across browser restarts
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → - [ ] Unauthenticated users are redirected to login
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → ```
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → **Do NOT write implementation steps** like:
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → - ~~Install passport.js~~
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → - ~~Create auth middleware~~
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → - ~~Add login route~~
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → Ask: "Does this capture what success looks like?"
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → ### 5. Build Flow Graph
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → Compose flow based on detected stack. Pattern: `developer -> reviewer -> stpa-analyst`
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → **Go backend:**
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → ```yaml
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → flow: |
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   →   "backend-go-developer" -> "go-readability-reviewer"
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   →   "go-readability-reviewer" -> "stpa-analyst"
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → ```
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 
[00:00:04.749][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → **React frontend:**
[00:00:04.750][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → ```yaml
[00:00:04.750][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → flow: |
[00:00:04.750][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   →   "react-developer" -> "react-reviewer"
[00:00:04.750][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   →   "react-reviewer" -> "stpa-analyst"
[00:00:04.750][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → ```
[00:00:04.750][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 
[00:00:04.750][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → **HTMX frontend:**
[00:00:04.750][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → ```yaml
[00:00:04.750][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → flow: |
[00:00:04.750][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   →   "htmx-picocss-frontend-developer" -> "htmx-picocss-frontend-reviewer"
[00:00:04.750][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   →   "htmx-picocss-frontend-reviewer" -> "stpa-analyst"
[00:00:04.750][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → ```
[00:00:04.750][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 
[00:00:04.750][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → **Go + React (full stack):**
[00:00:04.750][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → ```yaml
[00:00:04.750][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → flow: |
[00:00:04.750][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   →   "backend-go-developer" -> "go-readability-reviewer"
[00:00:04.750][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   →   "go-readability-reviewer" -> "stpa-analyst"
[00:00:04.750][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   →   "react-developer" -> "react-reviewer"
[00:00:04.750][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   →   "react-reviewer" -> "stpa-analyst"
[00:00:04.750][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → ```
[00:00:04.750][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 
[00:00:04.750][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → **Shell/CLI tools:**
[00:00:04.750][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → ```yaml
[00:00:04.750][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → flow: |
[00:00:04.750][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   →   "shell-script-coder" -> "shell-script-reviewer"
[00:00:04.750][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   →   "shell-script-reviewer" -> "stpa-analyst"
[00:00:04.750][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → ```
[00:00:04.750][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 
[00:00:04.750][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → **Python/general with shell:**
[00:00:04.750][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → ```yaml
[00:00:04.750][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → flow: |
[00:00:04.750][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   →   "general-purpose" -> "stpa-analyst"
[00:00:04.750][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   →   "shell-script-coder" -> "shell-script-reviewer"
[00:00:04.750][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   →   "shell-script-reviewer" -> "stpa-analyst"
[00:00:04.750][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → ```
[00:00:04.750][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 
[00:00:04.750][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → **Architecture documentation:**
[00:00:04.750][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → ```yaml
[00:00:04.750][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → flow: |
[00:00:04.750][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   →   "c4-code" -> "c4-component"
[00:00:04.750][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   →   "c4-component" -> "c4-container"
[00:00:04.750][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   →   "c4-container" -> "c4-context"
[00:00:04.750][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → ```
[00:00:04.750][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 
[00:00:04.750][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → **General (no stack detected):**
[00:00:04.750][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → ```yaml
[00:00:04.750][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → flow: |
[00:00:04.750][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   →   "general-purpose" -> "stpa-analyst"
[00:00:04.750][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → ```
[00:00:04.750][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 
[00:00:04.750][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → Always include `stpa-analyst` as terminal node for safety analysis (except pure documentation flows).
[00:00:04.750][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 
[00:00:04.750][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → ### 6. Detect Completion Gate
[00:00:04.750][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 
[00:00:04.750][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → Look for test commands:
[00:00:04.750][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 
[00:00:04.752][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → | File | Gate Script |
[00:00:04.752][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → |------|-------------|
[00:00:04.752][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → | `go.mod` | `go test ./...` |
[00:00:04.752][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → | `package.json` with test script | `npm test` |
[00:00:04.752][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → | `Makefile` with test target | `make test` |
[00:00:04.752][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → | None | Omit `completionGateScript` |
[00:00:04.752][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 
[00:00:04.752][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → ### 7. Show Preview
[00:00:04.752][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 
[00:00:04.752][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → Display the complete GOAL.md and ask:
[00:00:04.752][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → > "Here's the goal file. Ready to write it?"
[00:00:04.752][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 
[00:00:04.752][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → ### 8. Backup and Write
[00:00:04.752][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 
[00:00:04.752][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → If `GOAL.md` exists:
[00:00:04.753][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 1. Rename to `GOAL.md.YYYY-MM-DD-HHMMSS.bak`
[00:00:04.753][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 2. Inform user of backup
[00:00:04.753][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 
[00:00:04.753][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → Write new `GOAL.md` to repository root.
[00:00:04.753][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 
[00:00:04.753][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → ## GOAL.md Format
[00:00:04.753][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 
[00:00:04.753][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → ```yaml
[00:00:04.753][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → ---
[00:00:04.753][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → flow: |
[00:00:04.753][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   →   "agent-a" -> "agent-b"
[00:00:04.753][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   →   "agent-b" -> "stpa-analyst"
[00:00:04.753][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → models:
[00:00:04.753][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   →   "coordinator": "anthropic/claude-opus-4-6 (max)"
[00:00:04.753][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   →   "agent-a": "anthropic/claude-opus-4-6"
[00:00:04.753][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   →   "agent-b": "anthropic/claude-opus-4-6"
[00:00:04.753][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   →   "stpa-analyst": "anthropic/claude-opus-4-6"
[00:00:04.753][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → interactive: yes
[00:00:04.753][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → completionGateScript: go test ./...
[00:00:04.753][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → ---
[00:00:04.753][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 
[00:00:04.753][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → Brief description of the goal in 1-2 sentences.
[00:00:04.753][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 
[00:00:04.753][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → ## Success Criteria
[00:00:04.753][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 
[00:00:04.753][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → - [ ] Outcome-based criterion 1
[00:00:04.753][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → - [ ] Outcome-based criterion 2
[00:00:04.753][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → - [ ] Outcome-based criterion 3
[00:00:04.753][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → ```

[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 56: ## Handler Interface
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 57: 
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 58: The `ragfs.Handler` interface is the core abstraction. Any cloud storage backend implements this interface, and ragfs provides FUSE mounting and caching on top.
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 59: 
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 60: ```go
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 61: package ragfs
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 62: 
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 63: import (
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 64:     "context"
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 65:     "io"
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 66:     "time"
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 67: )
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 68: 
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 69: // Entry represents a file or directory in the virtual filesystem.
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 70: type Entry struct {
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 71:     Name    string
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 72:     IsDir   bool
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 73:     Size    uint64
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 74:     ModTime time.Time
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 75:     Mode    os.FileMode
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 76:     // MimeType is the original MIME type from the backend.
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 77:     // Used to determine how to present the file (e.g., Google Doc -> .md).
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 78:     MimeType string
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 79:     // BackendID is the opaque identifier used by the backend (e.g., Drive file ID).
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 80:     BackendID string
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 81: }
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 82: 
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 83: // Handler defines the interface that cloud storage backends must implement.
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 84: type Handler interface {
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 85:     // List returns entries within the given directory path.
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 86:     List(ctx context.Context, path string) ([]Entry, error)
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 87: 
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 88:     // Read returns the content of the file at the given path.
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 89:     // For Google Docs, this returns markdown-converted content.
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 90:     Read(ctx context.Context, path string) ([]byte, error)
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 91: 
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 92:     // Write writes data to the file at the given path.
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 93:     // For Google Docs, this converts markdown back to Doc format.
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 94:     Write(ctx context.Context, path string, data []byte) error
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 95: 
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 96:     // Delete removes the file or empty directory at the given path.
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 97:     Delete(ctx context.Context, path string) error
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 98: 
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 99:     // Rename moves or renames a file from oldPath to newPath.
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 100:     Rename(ctx context.Context, oldPath, newPath string) error
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 101: 
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 102:     // Stat returns metadata for the file or directory at the given path.
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 103:     Stat(ctx context.Context, path string) (*Entry, error)
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 104: 
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 105:     // Create creates a new file at the given path.
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 106:     Create(ctx context.Context, path string, isDir bool) (*Entry, error)
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 107: }
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 108: ```
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 109: 
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 110: ## Caching Strategy
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 111: 
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 112: The ragfs caching layer sits between FUSE operations and the Handler:
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 113: 
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 114: 1. **Metadata cache**: Directory listings and file stats cached with 30s TTL
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 115: 2. **Content cache**: File content cached in-memory (LRU, 100MB default cap) with 60s TTL
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 116: 3. **Write-through**: Writes update the cache immediately and propagate to backend
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 117: 4. **Invalidation**: On write/delete/rename, relevant cache entries are invalidated
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 118: 5. **Target**: Repeated reads of cached content must complete in <200ms
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 119: 
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 120: ```go
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 121: type Cache struct {
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 122:     metaTTL    time.Duration  // Default 30s
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 123:     contentTTL time.Duration  // Default 60s
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 124:     maxSize    int64          // Default 100MB
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 125:     mu         sync.RWMutex
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 126:     meta       map[string]*cachedMeta
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 127:     content    *lru.Cache     // hashicorp/golang-lru
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 128: }
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 129: ```
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 130: 
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 131: ## Google Drive Integration
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 132: 
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 133: ### Authentication (OAuth 2.0)
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 134: 
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 135: - Uses Google OAuth 2.0 with offline access for refresh tokens
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 136: - Scopes: `drive.file`, `drive.readonly`, `documents`
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 137: - Token stored in `$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/gdocs-md/token.json` (or `~/.config/gdocs-md/token.json`)
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 138: - Client credentials in `$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/gdocs-md/credentials.json`
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 139: - `gdocs-md auth` launches browser-based OAuth flow, stores token
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 140: 
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 141: ### File Type Mapping
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 142: 
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 143: | Google Drive MIME Type | Presented As | Behavior |
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 144: |------------------------|-------------|----------|
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 145: | `application/vnd.google-apps.document` | `filename.md` | Convert to/from markdown |
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 146: | `application/vnd.google-apps.folder` | directory | Map to FUSE directory |
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 147: | `application/pdf` | `filename.pdf` | Pass-through (read-only download) |
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 148: | `image/*` | `filename.png/jpg/etc` | Pass-through (read-only download) |
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 149: | Other binary files | original name | Pass-through (read/write) |
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 150: 
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 151: ### Markdown Conversion
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 152: 
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 153: #### Google Doc -> Markdown (Read Path)
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 154: 
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 155: Use Google Docs API `documents.get` to retrieve structured document, then convert:
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 156: 
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 157: | Doc Element | Markdown |
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 158: |-------------|----------|
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 159: | Paragraph (NORMAL) | Plain text with newline |
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 160: | Paragraph (HEADING_1..6) | `#` through `######` |
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 161: | Bold text run | `**text**` |
[00:00:19.284][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 162: | Italic text run | `*text*` |
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 163: | Bold+Italic | `***text***` |
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 164: | Strikethrough | `~~text~~` |
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 165: | Code text run | `` `text` `` |
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 166: | Ordered list | `1.` numbered items |
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 167: | Unordered list | `-` items |
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 168: | Named style SUBTITLE | `## subtitle` |
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 169: | Link | `[text](url)` |
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 170: | Inline image | `![alt](imageUrl)` |
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 171: | Table | GFM table syntax |
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 172: | Horizontal rule | `---` |
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 173: | Code block (monospace paragraph) | Fenced code block |
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 174: 
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 175: #### Markdown -> Google Doc (Write Path)
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 176: 
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 177: Parse markdown with goldmark, then generate `documents.batchUpdate` requests:
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 178: 
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 179: 1. Parse markdown AST
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 180: 2. Map AST nodes to Google Docs API request objects
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 181: 3. Clear existing document content (delete all)
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 182: 4. Insert new content via batchUpdate
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 183: 5. Apply formatting via batchUpdate
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 184: 
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 185: ### Error Handling
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 186: 
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 187: - Network errors: Return `EIO` to FUSE, log error, retain cache
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 188: - Auth errors: Return `EACCES`, prompt re-authentication on next CLI invocation
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 189: - Rate limiting: Exponential backoff with jitter, up to 5 retries
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 190: - Conflict (concurrent edit): Last-write-wins with warning log
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 191: 
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 192: ## Phased MVP Scope
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 193: 
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 194: ### Phase 1: Auth + Read-Only Mount (Core)
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 195: - OAuth 2.0 authentication flow (`gdocs-md auth`)
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 196: - Mount a single Google Drive folder (`gdocs-md mount <folder-id> <mountpoint>`)
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 197: - List files in the folder as FUSE directory entries
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 198: - Read Google Docs as markdown files
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 199: - Read PDFs and images as pass-through files
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 200: - In-memory caching of reads
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 201: 
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 202: **Success criteria addressed**: Auth, Mount, Read Docs as MD, PDFs/images pass-through, Caching
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 203: 
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 204: ### Phase 2: Write Support
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 205: - Write/save a `.md` file to update the Google Doc
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 206: - Create new files
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 207: - Delete files (remove from Drive)
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 208: - Move/rename files within the mount
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 209: 
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 210: **Success criteria addressed**: Edit/save updates Doc, Delete removes from Drive, Move/rename
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 211: 
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 212: ### Phase 3: Reliability + Polish
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 213: - Round-trip conversion fidelity (>= 95%)
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 214: - Write-through cache with proper invalidation
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 215: - Comprehensive error handling (no data loss)
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 216: - Graceful unmount and signal handling
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 217: 
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 218: **Success criteria addressed**: 95% round-trip fidelity, No data loss
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 219: 
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 220: ## Dependencies
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 221: 
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 222: | Package | Purpose |
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 223: |---------|---------|
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 224: | `bazil.org/fuse` | FUSE filesystem interface |
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 225: | `google.golang.org/api/drive/v3` | Google Drive API |
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 226: | `google.golang.org/api/docs/v1` | Google Docs API |
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 227: | `golang.org/x/oauth2` | OAuth 2.0 client |
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 228: | `golang.org/x/oauth2/google` | Google OAuth provider |
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 229: | `github.com/spf13/cobra` | CLI framework |
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 230: | `github.com/yuin/goldmark` | Markdown parser (for write path) |
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 231: | `github.com/hashicorp/golang-lru/v2` | LRU cache |
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 232: 
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 233: ## CLI Interface
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 234: 
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 235: ```
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 236: gdocs-md - Mount Google Drive as a local filesystem with Docs as Markdown
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 237: 
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 238: Usage:
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 239:   gdocs-md [command]
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 240: 
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 241: Commands:
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 242:   auth     Authenticate with Google Drive via OAuth
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 243:   mount    Mount a Google Drive folder as a local directory
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 244:   version  Print version information
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 245: 
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 246: Flags:
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 247:   -v, --verbose   Enable verbose logging
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 248: 
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 249: Examples:
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 250:   gdocs-md auth
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 251:   gdocs-md mount <folder-id> ~/drive
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 252:   gdocs-md mount --cache-size 200MB <folder-id> ~/drive
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 253: ```
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 254: 
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 255: ### Mount Command Flags
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 256: 
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 257: | Flag | Default | Description |
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 258: |------|---------|-------------|
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 259: | `--cache-size` | `100MB` | Maximum in-memory cache size |
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 260: | `--cache-ttl` | `60s` | Cache TTL for content |
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 261: | `--meta-ttl` | `30s` | Cache TTL for metadata |
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 262: | `--foreground` | `false` | Run in foreground (don't daemonize) |
[00:00:19.285][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 263: | `--read-only` | `false` | Mount as read-only |

[00:01:12.787][md-to-gdocs][coordinator            :0003]   → 72:               "after": "# Design: gdocs-md\n\nA Go CLI tool that mounts Google Drive as a local FUSE filesystem, presenting Google Docs as editable markdown files.\n\n## Architecture Overview\n\n```\n+-------------------+     +-------------------+     +-------------------+\n|   CLI (cobra)     | --> |   ragfs (FUSE +   | --> |   Google Drive    |\n|   gdocs-md mount  |     |   caching layer)  |     |   Handler         |\n|   gdocs-md auth   |     |                   |     |                   |\n+-------------------+     +-------------------+     +-------------------+\n                                                            |\n                                    +-------------------+   |   +-------------------+\n                                    | Markdown Converter|<--+-->| Google Drive API   |\n                                    | (Docs <-> MD)     |       | (v3 + Docs API)    |\n                                    +-------------------+       +-------------------+\n```\n\n### Package Layout\n\n```\ngdocs-md/\n  cmd/\n    gdocs-md/\n      main.go              # Entry point\n  internal/\n    cli/\n      root.go              # Root cobra command\n      mount.go             # Mount subcommand\n      auth.go              # Auth subcommand\n    gdrive/\n      handler.go           # ragfs.Handler implementation for Google Drive\n      client.go            # Google Drive API v3 client wrapper\n      docs.go              # Google Docs API interactions\n      oauth.go             # OAuth 2.0 token flow and storage\n      types.go             # Drive-specific types\n    converter/\n      tomarkdown.go        # Google Doc JSON -> Markdown\n      frommarkdown.go      # Markdown -> Google Docs API requests\n      elements.go          # Structural element mapping\n      converter_test.go    # Round-trip fidelity tests\n    ragfs/\n      ragfs.go             # FUSE filesystem server (bazil.org/fuse)\n      handler.go           # Handler interface definition\n      cache.go ...
